description: Public registry of PMP-compliant providers. v0.1 is a static JSON file; v0.2 will move to an on-chain ENS-style resolver. Submit a PR to add your provider.

providers.name: Clude
providers.description: Reference implementation of the Portable Memory Protocol. 5-tier typed memory, hybrid retrieval, on-chain commitments via the existing memory_registry PDA. Will move to Light Protocol compressed NFTs in v0.2.

submission_guidelines.where: Open a PR adding your provider to providers[] in this file.
checks: Endpoint serves all four v0.1 verbs at /v1/memories.
VERIFY returns the documented response shape (verified, reason, recomputed_hash, stored_hash, commitment).
Provider commits to honouring x402 composition on RETRIEVE (return 402 with x402 payload if gating).
submission_guidelines.removal: Providers that go offline for >30 days will be tagged 'inactive'. After 90 days they are removed; the entry is preserved in git history.
